user.title: Set up Priority State
user.description: Add a Priority State instance. Rules will control this light based on entity states.

change_light.title: Change target light
change_light.description: Select which light the rules will control.

add_rule.title: Add a rule
add_rule.description: When the watched entity is `on`, the light will change to this color.

debug_mode.title: Debug mode
debug_mode.description: When enabled, detailed logs are written to home-assistant.log for troubleshooting.

clear_rules.title: Clear all rules
clear_rules.description: Are you sure you want to delete **all** rules?

error.duplicate_entity: A rule for this entity already exists

remove_rule.name: Remove rule
remove_rule.description: Remove a rule by its ID

clear_rules.name: Clear all rules
clear_rules.description: Remove all rules and turn off the target light
